title: Soar SMP Plugin
description: Have you ever wanted to fly? Well the Soar Plugin has just that! You are able to obtain a Soar Orb to fly!!
body: How it works is when you kill a player you get a Soar Orb which allows you to fly! You can craft the Soar Orbs into a Sky Rim which lets you fly longer, And using 2 Sky Rims and 1 blaze rod you can craft a Soar Blade which has powers of the sky!
